prompt:
Candid summer street photography,
beautiful young woman walking through a tree-lined city street, navy baseball cap, oversized light gray button-up shirt over a white tank top, blue denim jeans, brown leather belt, long wavy dark hair, natural makeup, soft smile, playful wink, peace sign gesture, holding iced coffee, vintage compact camera, relaxed lifestyle aesthetic.

Shot on instant film / Polaroid style with thick white border frame, bright midday sunlight filtering through trees, dappled shadows on sidewalk, cinematic urban background, shallow depth of field, parked cars, cafés, storefronts, authentic city atmosphere, natural candid moments, effortless fashion, travel diary vibes.

Multiple poses and expressions:
• Looking back and flashing a peace sign
• Adjusting baseball cap shyly
• Sipping iced coffee while gazing away
• Leaning playfully toward camera holding a retro camera
• Genuine smile and candid movement

Photography Style:
ultra realistic, lifestyle photography, street fashion editorial, Fujifilm Instax aesthetic, Kodak Portra tones, soft natural skin texture, high detail hair strands, warm sunlight, dreamy bokeh, clean composition, casual elegance, influencer travel photography, authentic candid moment, magazine-quality photo, photorealistic, 85mm lens, f/2.0, natural lighting, high dynamic range, 8K.

Color Palette:
soft whites, denim blue, navy cap, warm skin tones, lush green trees, neutral city colors, bright summer atmosphere.
